title: astragalus narbonensis var. atlanticus
intro: Astragalus narbonensis var. atlanticus, also known as French milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and saponins, that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits, including improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular health. French milkvetch can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to support overall health and resilience.
